name: Guanghe Landscape Culture Communication Co., Ltd.
summary: Guanghe Landscape Culture Communication Co., Ltd. engages in the media advertising, real estate leasing, and building decoration engineering services. The company was formerly known as Tai Yuan Tianlong Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Guanghe Landscape Culture Communication Co., Ltd. in March 2014. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
